name: web_fetch
description: Fetch a URL and return its main text content (article extraction). Returns a readable summary with title + body, without nav/ads/markup.

url.description: The URL to fetch. Must start with http:// or https://. Loopback, link-local, private (RFC1918), and metadata addresses are refused by the runtime SSRF guard.

max_chars.description: Maximum characters of extracted body text to return. Default: 20000.
